testcase.name: test_sessions_list_and_delete

failure.message: AssertionError: expected 401 for revoked session, got 200 assert 200 == 401 + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/stage9_backend_test.py:266: in test_sessions_list_and_delete assert r_me.status_code == 401, f"expected 401 for revoked session, got {r_me.status_code}" E AssertionError: expected 401 for revoked session, got 200 E assert 200 == 401 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_logout_all_keep_current_true
testcase.failure: backend/tests/stage9_backend_test.py:291: in test_logout_all_keep_current_true assert r_b.status_code == 401 E assert 200 == 401 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_logout_all_keep_current_false
testcase.failure: backend/tests/stage9_backend_test.py:303: in test_logout_all_keep_current_false assert r_me.status_code == 401 E assert 200 == 401 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_logout_revokes_only_current
testcase.failure: backend/tests/stage9_backend_test.py:318: in test_logout_revokes_only_current assert r1.status_code == 401 E assert 200 == 401 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
